entries.value: {value1} hagayaal wax-ku-ool ah

entries.source: A {value1}-guide library built for learning that turns into action.
entries.value: Maktabad {value1} hage ah oo loo dhisay barasho ficil isu beddesha.

entries.source: A free public AI learning companion for tutoring, practice, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: Wehel barasho AI oo dadweynaha u bilaash ah, kana caawiya macallinnimo, ku celcelin, keddisyo, kaarar xusuus, dood, falcelin qoraal, caawimo koodh, iyo qorsheyn waxbarasho.

entries.source: A practical AI learning path for moving from confusion to clear explanation, Socratic questions, examples, and active recall.
entries.value: Jid barasho AI oo wax-ku-ool ah, kaaga qaadaya jahawareer una gudbinaya sharaxaad cad, su'aalo Socratic ah, tusaalooyin, iyo xusuus-celin firfircoon.

entries.source: A practical guide to using Learn Anything on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Hage wax-ku-ool ah oo ku saabsan isticmaalka Baro Wax Kasta ee inspir si loo barto aasaaska, oo leh tilmaamo, wareegyo waxbarasho, iyo caadooyin AI oo ka badbaado badan.

entries.source: A practical look at how AI can make learning clearer, more personal, and more accessible without turning students into passive answer collectors.
entries.value: Fiirin wax-ku-ool ah oo ku saabsan sida AI uga dhigi karto barashada mid ka cad, shakhsiyan u gaar ah, oo si fudud loo heli karo, iyada oo aan ardayda laga dhigin urursadayaal jawaabo oo aan firfircoonayn.

entries.source: A public learning site people can understand quickly.
entries.value: Goob waxbarasho dadweyne oo dadku si dhakhso ah u fahmi karaan.

entries.source: A short film introducing inspir's belief that learning should be free, accessible, and alive.
entries.value: Filim gaaban oo soo bandhigaya aaminsanaanta inspir ee ah in waxbarashadu ahaato bilaash, la heli karo, oo nool.

entries.value: Macallin su'aasha koowaad

entries.source: Answer a check question, try a step, debate a claim, revise a draft, or build recall cards.
entries.value: Ka jawaab su'aal hubin ah, tijaabi tallaabo, ka dood sheegasho, sax qabyo-qoraal, ama dhis kaarar xusuus-celin.
Keddisyadu ma ka fiican yihiin dib-u-akhriska?
Dood
Ku celcelinta doodda

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Weydii su'aal kasta oo ku baro sharaxaad cad, tusaalooyin, tilmaamo daba-socda, iyo macallinnimo AI oo dulqaad leh.
Weydii wax kasta
Weydii tilmaam yar

entries.source: Ask for a hint, not the answer
entries.value: Weydii tilmaam yar, ee ha weydiin jawaabta

entries.source: Ask for a simpler explanation of the weakest concept.
entries.value: Codso sharaxaad ka fudud fikradda ugu liidata.

entries.source: Ask for five questions that mix definitions, examples, and transfer problems.
entries.value: Codso shan su'aalood oo isku dara qeexitaanno, tusaalooyin, iyo layliyo aqoonta meel kale lagu dabaqayo.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, feedback, and study plans that keep the thinking with the learner.
entries.value: Codso tilmaamo yar, hubin, falcelin, iyo qorshayaal barasho oo fikirka ku reeba bartaha.

entries.source: Ask for the topic in plain language, then request one analogy, one example, and one common misconception.
entries.value: Codso mawduuca oo luqad fudud ku qoran, dabadeedna weydii hal tusaale-u-ekeysiin, hal tusaale, iyo hal faham khaldan oo caadi ah.

entries.source: Ask me five Socratic questions about this topic. After each answer, tell me what assumption I used and what to test next.
entries.value: I weydii shan su'aalood oo Socratic ah oo ku saabsan mawduucan. Jawaab kasta ka dib, ii sheeg mala-awaalka aan isticmaalay iyo waxa xiga ee la tijaabinayo.

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Weydii su'aalo, fikradaha la loollan, oo taariikh ku baro wada sheekeysi sal leh oo lala yeesho dad caan ah oo hore.

entries.source: Ask the historical mode to label what is documented, inferred, or simulated.
entries.value: Ka codso habka taariikhiga ah inuu calaamadeeyo waxa la diiwaangeliyey, waxa la qiyaasay, ama waxa la matalay.
Weydii su'aasha dhabta ah

entries.source: Ask your first question and move straight into practice.
entries.value: Weydii su'aashaada koowaad oo toos ugu gudub ku celcelin.

entries.source: Available publicly while schools can run confidential custom versions.
entries.value: Si dadweyne ayaa loo heli karaa, halka dugsiyadu ku shaqeyn karaan noocyo gaar ah oo qarsoodi ah.
Baadh hab kasta
Baadh maaddooyinka

entries.source: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Dhis baasaboor waqtiyeed, hubi tilmaamaha safarka, oo ku saham dunida taariikheed muuqaal, khariidad, jadwal-waqti, dad, xeerar, agab, iyo caddeyn.

entries.source: Build an AI exam prep workflow with a realistic study plan, retrieval practice, quizzes, flashcards, and weak-area review.
entries.value: Dhis habraac diyaarinta imtixaanka oo AI ah, leh qorshe barasho oo dhab ah, ku celcelinta xusuus-celinta, keddisyo, kaarar xusuus, iyo dib-u-eegista meelaha liita.
Dhis qorshe imtixaan
Dhiso qorshaha
Nala dhis

entries.source: Built for curiosity, practice, and access.
entries.value: Waxaa loo dhisay xiise, ku celcelin, iyo helitaan.

entries.source: Built from real learner behavior, not a generic chat box.
entries.value: Waxaa laga dhisay hab-dhaqanka bartayaasha dhabta ah, ma aha sanduuq wada sheekeysi guud.
Waxaa loo dhisay in la isticmaalo

entries.value: Caawinta shaqo-guriga ee AI ma noqon kartaa mid anshax leh?

entries.value: Ma xigan karaa wada sheekeysi taariikheed oo AI ah sidii ilo?

entries.value: Ma isticmaali karaa inspir anigoon galin?

Hubi qaabkayga fahamka
Hubi hal tallaabo

entries.source: Check the reasoning line by line
entries.value: Hubi sababeynta sadar sadar

entries.source: Check this step in my working. If it is wrong, explain the mistake and give me one next move.
entries.value: Hubi tallaabadan aan ka shaqeeyay. Haddii ay qaldan tahay, sharax qaladka oo ii sheeg hal tallaabo oo xigta.
Sharaxaado cad
Xuduudo asturnaan oo cad
Macallinka Koodhka
Koodh qorid
Isgaarsiin
Isbarbar dhig doodaha
Hirgelinno qarsoodi ah
Sii wad

entries.source: Contributions are welcome from engineers, educators, designers, students, and anyone who wants AI learning to be safer, clearer, more accessible, and more useful.
entries.value: Wax ku darsasho waa laga soo dhoweynayaa injineerro, barayaal, naqshadeeyayaal, arday, iyo qof kasta oo raba in barashada AI noqoto mid ka badbaado badan, ka cad, si fudud loo heli karo, oo waxtar badan.
Qaladaadka u rog wax la barto

entries.source: Convert the explanation into active recall cards, then revisit the cards after mistakes or hesitation.
entries.value: Sharaxaadda u rog kaarar xusuus-celin firfircoon ah, dabadeedna dib ugu noqo kaararka qaladaad ama hakad ka dib.
Samee keddis yar
Xiisuhu halkan ayuu ka bilaabmaa

entries.source: Curiosity, practice, and AI that teaches.
entries.value: Xiise, ku celcelin, iyo AI wax bara.

entries.source: Curious learners who want history and ideas to feel situated, debatable, and alive without losing track of evidence.
entries.value: Bartayaasha xiisaha leh ee raba in taariikhda iyo fikraduhu yeeshaan goob, laga doodi karo, oo nool, iyada oo aan caddeynta laga lumin.

entries.source: Custom AI learning spaces with data confidentiality.
entries.value: Goobo barasho AI oo la habeeyey, xogtuna qarsoodi tahay.
Ka dood sheegasho
Ka dood mawduuc kasta

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Ka dood mawduuc kasta, la loollan, isbarbar dhig sheegashooyinka, oo baro sida doodo ka xoog badan loo sameeyo.

entries.source: Debate helps you separate claims, evidence, values, and assumptions, which makes historical interpretation more precise.
entries.value: Dooddu waxay kaa caawisaa kala saaridda sheegashooyinka, caddeynta, qiyamka, iyo mala-awaallada, taas oo fasiraadda taariikhiga ah ka dhigta mid saxan.
Ka dood sheegashada

entries.source: Debate the claim from more than one side so you can notice assumptions, tradeoffs, and weak evidence.
entries.value: Sheegashada uga dood in ka badan hal dhinac si aad u aragto mala-awaallada, isu-dhaafsiyada, iyo caddeynta liidata.

entries.source: Debate this historical or philosophical claim from both sides. Separate evidence, assumptions, and values.
entries.value: Sheegashadan taariikheed ama falsafadeed uga dood labada dhinac. Kala saar caddeynta, mala-awaallada, iyo qiyamka.
Loo naqshadeeyey kalsooni

entries.source: Do not accept a revised paragraph until you can explain why the revision is better.
entries.value: Ha aqbalin faqradda la saxay ilaa aad sharxi karto sababta sixiddu uga fiican tahay.

entries.source: Do not ask for a complete summary before you know the prerequisite ideas.
entries.value: Ha codsan soo koobid dhammeystiran ka hor intaadan garan fikradaha hordhaca ah ee loo baahan yahay.

entries.source: Do not debate only the side you already agree with.
entries.value: Ha ka doodin oo keliya dhinaca aad hore ugu raacsan tahay.

entries.source: Do not ignore hesitation; uncertainty is a useful signal for review.
entries.value: Ha iska indha tirin hakadka; hubanti la'aantu waa calaamad waxtar leh oo dib-u-eegis lagu sameeyo.

entries.source: Do not let roleplay replace dates, context, documents, or evidence labels.
entries.value: Ha u oggolaan door-jilidda inay beddesho taariikho, macne guud, dukumeenti, ama calaamadaha caddeynta.

entries.source: Do not make a plan that assumes every topic needs equal time.
entries.value: Ha samayn qorshe u qaata in mawduuc kasta waqti isku mid ah u baahan yahay.

entries.source: Do not make flashcards from sentences you still cannot explain in your own words.
entries.value: Ha ka samayn kaarar xusuus jumlado aadan weli erayadaada ku sharxi karin.

entries.source: Do not paste an assignment and ask for the finished response.
entries.value: Ha dhajin hawl oo ha codsan jawaab dhammeystiran.

entries.source: Do not reread notes before testing what you can already recall.
entries.value: Ha dib u akhrin qoraallada ka hor intaadan tijaabin waxa aad hore u xusuusan karto.

entries.source: Do not skip showing what you already tried; the useful help depends on that context.
entries.value: Ha ka boodin muujinta wixii aad hore u isku dayday; caawimada waxtarka leh waxay ku xiran tahay macnahaas.

entries.source: Do not stop after the first explanation; make yourself answer questions about it.
entries.value: Ha istaagin sharaxaadda koowaad ka dib; naftaada ku qas inaad su'aalo uga jawaabto.

entries.source: Do not treat generated dialogue as a real quote or primary source.
entries.value: Ha ula dhaqmin wada sheekeysi la abuuray sidii xigasho dhab ah ama ilo koowaad.
Wax ku samee
inspir ma taageeraa dugsiyada?

entries.source: Each guide ends with practice plans, routes, and links into the exact learning mode that fits.
entries.value: Hage kasta wuxuu ku dhammaadaa qorshayaal ku celcelin, jidad, iyo xiriiriyeyaal gala habka barasho ee saxda ah.

entries.source: Each guide points to a mode, prompt, or review loop so reading can become practice.
entries.value: Hage kasta wuxuu tilmaamaa hab, tilmaam, ama wareeg dib-u-eegis si akhrisku ugu beddelmo ku celcelin.

entries.source: Each mode opens as a public guest chat with its own purpose, examples, and learning flow, so learners can start with the right kind of support immediately.
entries.value: Hab kasta wuxuu u furmaa wada sheekeysi marti oo dadweyne, leh ujeeddo, tusaalooyin, iyo socod barasho oo u gaar ah, si bartayaashu isla markiiba ugu bilaabaan taageerada ku habboon.
Tallaabooyin xiga oo fudud
Geli xilli
Geli macnaha guud

entries.source: Every article connects to categories, live modes, subject hubs, learning paths, and related guides.
entries.value: Maqaal kasta wuxuu ku xirmaa qaybo, habab toos ah, xarumo maaddo, jidad barasho, iyo hagayaal la xiriira.

entries.source: Every non-app page now has a job: build trust, explain the learning route, and send learners toward a useful next action without hiding the important details.
entries.value: Bog kasta oo aan qaybta barnaamijka ahayn hadda shaqo ayuu leeyahay: dhis kalsooni, sharax jidka barashada, oo bartayaasha u dir ficil xiga oo waxtar leh adigoon qarin faahfaahinta muhiimka ah.
Muuqaallo caddeyn tixgeliya
Diyaarinta imtixaanka
Qorsheeyaha Diyaarinta Imtixaanka
Dib ugu sharax
Sharax tallaabada xigta

entries.source: Explain this topic in plain language. Name the three prerequisite ideas I need, one analogy, and one common misconception.
entries.value: Mawduucan ku sharax luqad fudud. Magacow saddexda fikradood ee hordhaca ah ee aan u baahanahay, hal tusaale-u-ekeysiin, iyo hal faham khaldan oo caadi ah.

entries.source: Explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, writing, code, debate, and study planning.
entries.value: Sharaxaado, macallinnimo Socratic ah, tababar shaqo-guri, keddisyo, kaarar xusuus, qoraal, koodh, dood, iyo qorsheyn waxbarasho.

entries.value: Taariikh iyo Fikrado Waaweyn ku Sahami AI
Sahami taariikh iyo fikrado

entries.source: Explore history, public figures, causes, debates, philosophy, and source critique with AI learning modes that separate evidence from simulation.
entries.value: Ku sahami AI taariikh, dad caan ah, sababaha, doodaha, falsafadda, iyo naqdinta ilaha adigoo adeegsanaya habab barasho oo caddeynta ka sooca matalidda.
Sahami dugsiyada

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Kaararka xusuustu si fiican bay u shaqeeyaan marka ay hal fikrad markiiba tijaabiyaan, jawaabahana muujiyaan kaliya dadaal ka dib, isla markaana kaararka la seegay dhaqso loo eego.

entries.source: For math or logic, work one step at a time and ask why each move is allowed before moving on.
entries.value: Xisaab ama caqli ahaan, hal tallaabo markiiba u shaqee oo weydii sababta dhaqaaq kasta loo oggol yahay ka hor intaadan sii gudbin.
Dugsiyada iyo la-hawlgalayaasha CSR

entries.value: Samee keddis doorasho-badan oo diiradda saaraya maaddo kasta, kadibna dib u eeg sharaxaadaha jawaab kasta ka dib.

entries.source: Get a study schedule, quiz yourself on weak areas, and turn misses into flashcards for repeated review.
entries.value: Hel jadwal barasho, naftaada ka keddi meelaha liita, oo qaladaadka u rog kaarar xusuus oo dib-u-eegis soo noqnoqda leh.
Marka hore hel qaabka fudud

entries.value: Shaqo-guriga kaga bax ku dhegganaanta adigoo adeegsanaya tilmaamo anshax leh, tusaalooyin, hubin, iyo tababar tallaabo-tallaabo ah.

entries.source: Give feedback on structure, clarity, and evidence. Keep my voice and do not rewrite the whole answer.
entries.value: Ka bixi falcelin ku saabsan qaab-dhismeedka, caddaanta, iyo caddeynta. Ilaali codkayga, hana dib u qorin jawaabta oo dhan.

Maktabadda hagayaasha

Khariidad barasho oo waxtar leh

entries.source: Here is the question and what I tried. Give me the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Tani waa su'aasha iyo wixii aan isku dayay. I sii tilmaanta ugu yar ee waxtar leh, ee ha ii siin jawaabta kama dambaysta ah.

entries.value: Qoraalka ku hagaaji qorsheyn, dib-u-habeyn, qaab-dhismeed, iyo falcelin ilaalisa codkaaga.

entries.source: Include the question, what you already tried, where you got stuck, and whether you want a hint, a step check, or feedback.

Maktabadda hagayaasha barashada AI ee inspir

entries.source: inspir began as quizzes and student communities, grew through schools and events, and now uses AI to make one-to-one learning more accessible.
entries.value: inspir wuxuu ku bilowday keddisyo iyo bulshooyin arday, wuxuu ku koray dugsiyo iyo dhacdooyin, haddana wuxuu AI u adeegsadaa inuu barashada qof-ka-qof ah ka dhigo mid si fudud loo heli karo.

entries.source: inspir exists for the moment a learner wants to understand something and needs a patient place to begin. The film introduces the product as a free public learning companion for curiosity, practice, and access.
entries.value: inspir wuxuu u jiraa daqiiqadda uu barte doonayo inuu wax fahmo oo u baahan yahay meel dulqaad leh oo uu ka bilaabo. Filimku wuxuu adeegga u soo bandhigayaa wehel barasho dadweyne oo bilaash ah, kuna dhisan xiise, ku celcelin, iyo helitaan.
inspir oo dhaqaaqaya

entries.source: inspir is being built in public.
entries.value: inspir dadweynaha hortiisa ayaa lagu dhisayaa.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes with specific teaching shapes: hints, Socratic questions, quizzes, active recall, role-play, debate, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir waxaa lagu habeeyey habab barasho oo leh qaabab waxbarid gaar ah: tilmaamo yar, su'aalo Socratic ah, keddisyo, xusuus-celin firfircoon, door-jilid, dood, falcelin qoraal, iyo qorsheyn waxbarasho.
Filimka barashada ee inspir

entries.source: inspir turns curiosity, homework, revision, and big questions into guided AI learning sessions that explain, ask back, and help you practise.
entries.value: inspir wuxuu xiisaha, shaqo-guriga, dib-u-celinta casharrada, iyo su'aalaha waaweyn u rogaa kalfadhiyo barasho AI oo hagaya, sharaxa, dib kuu weydiiya, kuna caawiya inaad ku celceliso.
inspir: Wax kasta waad baran kartaa
inspir ma bilaash baa in la isticmaalo?
Jidka sii noolee

entries.source: Know what to try next, why a step works, where the mistake happened, and how to revise the final answer in your own voice.
entries.value: Ogow waxa xiga ee la isku dayo, sababta tallaabo u shaqeyso, meesha qaladku dhacay, iyo sida jawaabta kama dambaysta ah loogu saxo codkaaga.
Baro Wax Kasta

entries.source: Learn Anything prompts and study loop
entries.value: Tilmaamaha Baro Wax Kasta iyo wareeg barasho

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor: practical guide
entries.value: Baro Wax Kasta adigoo la jooga Macallin AI Bilaash ah: hage wax-ku-ool ah

entries.source: Learn by talking, testing, debating, and exploring.
entries.value: Ku baro hadal, tijaabin, dood, iyo sahamin.

entries.source: Learn programming, debug concepts, plan projects, interpret data, and research technical questions with public AI modes that keep the learner in the loop.
entries.value: Baro barnaamij-samaynta, sax fikradaha kugu wareersan, qorshee mashruucyo, fasir xog, oo baadh su'aalo farsamo adigoo adeegsanaya habab AI oo dadweyne oo bartaha ku haya wareegga.

entries.source: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Ku baro su'aalo diiradda leh, tilmaamo yar, iyo milicsi halkii aad si dadban u akhrin lahayd jawaabo.

entries.source: Learn with a free AI tutor for explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: Ku baro macallin AI oo bilaash ah, oo bixiya sharaxaado, su'aalo Socratic ah, tababar shaqo-guri, keddisyo, kaarar xusuus, dood, falcelin qoraal, caawimo koodh, iyo qorsheyn waxbarasho.
Taageero bartaha mudnaanta siinaysa

entries.source: Learners need a sequence, not a pile of links. These paths connect modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Bartayaashu waxay u baahan yihiin taxane, ma aha xirmo xiriiriyeyaal ah. Jidadkani waxay hababka ku xiraan wareegyo barasho oo wax-ku-ool ah oo loogu talagalay faham, shaqo-guri, diyaarinta imtixaanka, iyo sahamin.

entries.source: Learners who feel stuck at the beginning of a new subject or need a simpler path into a difficult idea.
entries.value: Bartayaasha ku xannibma bilowga maaddo cusub ama u baahan jid ka fudud oo fikrad adag lagu galo.

entries.source: Learners who have limited time, a large syllabus, and need a realistic way to review without pretending everything matters equally.
entries.value: Bartayaasha waqtigoodu kooban yahay, manhaj weyn haysta, una baahan hab dhab ah oo dib loogu eego iyada oo aan la iska dhigin in wax walba si isku mid ah muhiim u yihiin.
Barasho qof walba
hagayaal barasho iyo wareegyo ku celcelin

entries.source: Leave with a plain-language model, sharper questions, examples you can explain back, and recall cards for review.
entries.value: Ka bax adigoo haysta qaab luqad fudud ah, su'aalo ka fiiqan, tusaalooyin aad dib u sharxi karto, iyo kaarar xusuus-celin oo dib loo eego.

entries.source: Let me interview this historical person. Keep answers evidence-aware and mark uncertainty clearly.
entries.value: Ii oggolow inaan wareysto qofkan taariikhiga ah. Jawaabaha ha ahaadaan kuwo caddeyn tixgeliya, hubanti la'aantana si cad u calaamadee.

entries.source: Make flashcards from errors and revisit them after a delay.
entries.value: Qaladaadka ka samee kaarar xusuus, dibna ugu noqo muddo ka dib.

entries.source: Make flashcards from errors, hesitation, formulas, definitions, and concepts you could not explain clearly.
entries.value: Kaarar xusuus ka samee qaladaadka, hakadka, qaaciidooyinka, qeexitaannada, iyo fikradaha aadan si cad u sharxi karin.
Ka dhig mid ku dhegga
Fikradda ka dhig mid ku dhegta
Qorshaha barashada ka dhig mid dhab ah
Xisaab
Tababaraha Tallaabooyinka Xisaabta

entries.source: Math, writing, coding, history, homework, and exam prep each need different help. Start from the subject, then move into the mode, prompt, guide, or review loop that fits.
entries.value: Xisaab, qoraal, koodh qorid, taariikh, shaqo-guri, iyo diyaarinta imtixaanku mid walba caawimo gaar ah ayuu u baahan yahay. Ka bilow maaddada, dabadeedna u gudub habka, tilmaanta, hagaha, ama wareegga dib-u-eegista ee ku habboon.
Hadafka ayaa horreeya

entries.source: Mode guides, prompt loops, study methods, and cornerstone articles for common learning moments.
entries.value: Hagayaasha hababka, wareegyada tilmaamaha, hababka waxbarasho, iyo maqaallada aasaasiga ah ee waqtiyada barasho ee caadiga ah.

entries.source: Move from a plain-language explanation into questions, examples, and memory practice.
entries.value: Ka gudub sharaxaad luqad fudud ah una gudub su'aalo, tusaalooyin, iyo ku celcelin xusuus.

entries.source: Move into Socratic questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, role-play, and guided instruction.
entries.value: U gudub su'aalo Socratic ah, keddisyo, kaarar xusuus, dood, door-jilid, iyo barid hageysan.
Aamusii filimka

entries.source: My exam is on this date. Here is the syllabus, my weak areas, and my available time. Make a realistic plan with daily recall.
entries.value: Imtixaankaygu taariikhdan ayuu dhacayaa. Kan waa manhajka, meelaha aan ku liito, iyo waqtigayga bannaan. Samee qorshe dhab ah oo leh xusuus-celin maalinle ah.
Ikhtiyaarro la jaanqaada NCERT
Tallaabada xigta

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: Maya. Wada sheekeysiga la abuuray u qaado matalid waxbarasho. Sheegashooyinka xaqiiqada ah u xigso ilo koowaad ama labaad oo dhab ah.

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: Ma aha sanduuq jawaab kale. Waa meel wax lagu barto.

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: Fur hab oo isla markiiba bilow; khibradda martida dadweynaha uma baahna akoonti.
Si ula kac ah ayuu u furan yahay
Filimka ku fur shaashad buuxda
Fur wada sheekeysiga martida
Fur xarunta maaddada

entries.source: Open the exact kind of help you came for.
entries.value: Fur nooca caawimada saxda ah ee aad u timid.
Fur khariidadda barashada
Fur jidka

entries.source: Pages are designed to move people from explanation into a live mode, prompt, quiz, or review loop.
entries.value: Bogagga waxaa loogu talagalay inay dadka ka dhaqaajiyaan sharaxaad una gudbiyaan hab toos ah, tilmaam, keddis, ama wareeg dib-u-eegis.

entries.source: Paste the question and what you have tried, then ask for the smallest useful next step.
entries.value: Dhaji su'aasha iyo waxa aad isku dayday, dabadeedna codso tallaabada xigta ee ugu yar ee waxtarka leh.
Hakad geli filimka

entries.source: Place me in this time and location. Label documented facts separately from plausible simulation and ask what I notice.
entries.value: I geli waqtigan iyo goobtan. Xaqiiqooyinka la diiwaangeliyey si gooni ah uga calaamadee matalidda macquulka ah, kadibna i weydii waxa aan arko.
Sharaxaado luqad fudud ah

entries.source: Plan exam revision, generate quizzes, build flashcards, schedule spaced review, and keep motivation realistic with focused AI learning modes.
entries.value: Qorshee dib-u-celinta imtixaanka, samee keddisyo, dhis kaarar xusuus, jadwal u samee dib-u-eegis kala fog, oo dhiirrigelinta ka dhig mid dhab ah adigoo adeegsanaya habab barasho AI oo diiradda leh.

entries.source: Plan the work, practise retrieval, and close weak spots with quizzes and active recall.
entries.value: Qorshee shaqada, ku celceli xusuus-celinta, oo meelaha liita ku xidh keddisyo iyo xusuus-celin firfircoon.
Qorsheyn
Daar filimka
Daar hordhaca barashada inspir
Jidad barasho AI oo caan ah
Jidad caan ah
Ku celcelin
Ku celcelin, ma aha koobiyeyn jawaab
Ku celceli xusuus-celinta ka hor dib-u-akhriska
U diyaar garow imtixaan

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Learn Anything on inspir.
entries.value: Fikrado tilmaameed iyo wareeg barasho oo la celin karo si natiijooyin waxbarasho oo waxtar leh looga helo Baro Wax Kasta ee inspir.
Su'aal weydii qof
Su'aal geli aragti taariikheed

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: Su'aaluhu waxay soo saaraan qaabkaaga fahamka mawduuca, waana halka jahawareerka, kalsoonida been ah, iyo hordhacyada kaa maqan badanaa ka muuqdaan.
Jawaabo degdeg ah

entries.source: Quiz me on these topics one question at a time. After each answer, explain the gap and increase difficulty slowly.
entries.value: Mawduucyadan iga keddi hal su'aal markiiba. Jawaab kasta ka dib, sharax farqiga, adigoo tartiib u kordhinaya adkaanta.
Iga keddi Aqoon Guud
Keddi meelaha liita
Naftaada keddi

entries.source: Quiz yourself first so you can see what you actually remember and where confidence is misleading.
entries.value: Marka hore naftaada keddi si aad u aragto waxa aad dhab ahaan xusuusato iyo halka kalsoonidu ku marin habaabinayso.

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.
entries.value: Keddisyadu badanaa wax badan bay muujiyaan maxaa yeelay waxay tijaabiyaan xusuus-celinta. Dib-u-akhrisku wuu caawin karaa keddis ka dib marka la arko waxa u baahan hagaajin.
Akhri hadafka
Jadwal dhab ah
Sax hal qalad
Sax meesha liidata
Dib u ciyaar
Dib u bilow filimka

Kaarar xusuus ku dib-u-eeg
Sax qabyo-qoraalkayga
Sax adigoon lumin codkaaga
Kaydi qaladka
Jadwal u samee ku celcelinta xigta
Habraacyo dugsi-gaar ah

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: Dugsiyadu waxay bixin karaan waayo-aragnimo wada sheekeysi AI oo sumad gaar ah leh, kuna habboon bartayaashooda, oo ay ku jiraan nuxur iyo habraacyo la jaanqaada NCERT, iyadoo isticmaalka ay maalgelinayaan dugsiyada la-hawlgalayaasha ah ama kafaala-qaadka CSR.

entries.source: Search pages, blog guides, prompts, and live modes are linked around a simple loop: ask, try, check, repair, and review.
entries.value: Bogagga raadinta, hagayaasha baloogga, tilmaamaha, iyo hababka tooska ah ayaa lagu xiraa wareeg fudud: weydii, tijaabi, hubi, sax, oo dib u eeg.
Kala saar xaqiiqo iyo mala-awaal
Muuji cutubyada filimka
Muuji qoraalka filimka
Hubin Socratic ah
Barid Socratic ah
Macallin Socratic ah

entries.source: Socratic tutoring uses questions, hypotheses, hints, and reflection to build deeper understanding than passive answer reading.
entries.value: Macallinnimada Socratic waxay isticmaashaa su'aalo, mala-awaal, tilmaamo yar, iyo milicsi si loo dhiso faham ka qoto dheer akhrinta jawaabo si dadban.
Bilow kulan waxbarasho oo toos ah.

entries.source: Start as soon as you know the exam date. If time is short, prioritize weak areas, past-paper style questions, and daily recall.
entries.value: Bilow isla markaad ogaato taariikhda imtixaanka. Haddii waqtigu yar yahay, mudnaanta sii meelaha liita, su'aalaha qaabka waraaqihii hore, iyo xusuus-celin maalinle ah.

entries.source: Start by asking for a simple explanation, one everyday analogy, and the three ideas you need before the topic will make sense.
entries.value: Ku bilow adigoo codsanaya sharaxaad fudud, hal tusaale-u-ekeysiin maalinle ah, iyo saddexda fikradood ee aad u baahan tahay ka hor inta mawduucu kuu macno samayn.

entries.source: Start each session with a quick quiz before rereading.
entries.value: Kalfadhi kasta ku bilow keddis degdeg ah ka hor dib-u-akhriska.
Ka bilow mabaadi'da aasaasiga ah

entries.source: Start from the subject, then open the right learning mode.
entries.value: Ka bilow maaddada, dabadeed fur habka barasho ee saxda ah.

entries.source: Start from the thing you do not understand and get a plain-language model, examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Ka bilow waxa aadan fahmin, helna qaab luqad fudud ah, tusaalooyin, iyo tallaabooyin xiga.
Bilow waxbarashada

entries.source: Start with a topic, assignment, draft, exam, or idea in the mode that fits the job.
entries.value: Ku bilow mawduuc, hawl, qabyo-qoraal, imtixaan, ama fikrad adigoo isticmaalaya habka shaqada ku habboon.
Ku bilow Baro Wax Kasta

entries.source: Start with place, time, identity, constraints, and evidence labels so the scene does not become generic roleplay.
entries.value: Ku bilow goob, waqti, aqoonsi, xaddidaadyo, iyo calaamadaha caddeynta si muuqaalku uusan u noqon door-jilid guud.

entries.source: Start with the job you need done.
entries.value: Ka bilow shaqada aad u baahan tahay in la qabto.
Sheeg meesha aad ku dhegtay
Hubinta tallaabooyinka

entries.source: Step into historical context, compare arguments, and practise seeing an idea from more than one side.
entries.value: Gal macnaha taariikheed, isbarbar dhig doodaha, oo ku celceli inaad fikrad ka aragto in ka badan hal dhinac.

entries.source: Students who need a next step, a mistake check, or feedback without losing ownership of the assignment.
entries.value: Ardayda u baahan tallaabo xigta, hubin qalad, ama falcelin iyaga oo aan lumin lahaanshaha hawsha.

entries.source: Study loops, AI tutoring guides, and practical prompts.
entries.value: Wareegyada barashada, hagayaasha macallinnimada AI, iyo tilmaamo wax-ku-ool ah.

entries.source: subject hubs mapped to learner needs
entries.value: xarumaha maaddooyinka oo loo habeeyey baahiyaha bartaha
Soo koob macnaha guud

entries.source: Supports extracurricular learning, academic practice, and curiosity.
entries.value: Waxay taageertaa barashada ka baxsan manhajka, ku celcelinta akadeemiga ah, iyo xiisaha.

entries.source: Switch into questions so you can reveal assumptions and fill gaps instead of passively reading the answer.
entries.value: U beddel su'aalo si aad u muujiso mala-awaallada una buuxiso godadka halkii aad si dadban u akhrin lahayd jawaabta.

entries.source: Talk to a historical figure while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented quotation.
entries.value: La hadal qof taariikhi ah adigoo wada sheekeysiga la abuuray ka soocaya xigashada la diiwaangeliyey.
La hadal qof taariikhi ah
AI kula hadal dad taariikhi ah
Tijaabi ka hor dib-u-eegista
Tijaabi doodda
Tijaabi sababeyntaada

entries.source: The blog connects useful learning advice to live practice, so a guide can become a study session in one step.
entries.value: Balooggu wuxuu talada barashada ee waxtarka leh ku xiraa ku celcelin toos ah, si hage uu hal tallaabo ugu noqdo kalfadhi barasho.

entries.source: The blog is organized around real study moments: getting unstuck, remembering more, writing better, preparing for exams, and exploring ideas with a patient tutor.
entries.value: Balooggu wuxuu ku dhisan yahay waqtiyo barasho oo dhab ah: ka bixidda ku dhegganaanta, xusuusasho badan, qoraal ka wanaagsan, diyaarinta imtixaannada, iyo fikrado la sahamiyo iyadoo la joogo macallin dulqaad leh.
Madasha inspir ee il-furan ee ballaaran.

entries.source: The closing beat returns to the mission: public access, schools, and a more open way to learn.
entries.value: Qaybta xiritaanka waxay ku noqotaa hadafka: helitaan dadweyne, dugsiyo, iyo hab barasho oo ka furan.
Dib-u-dhiska hadda ee inspirlearning.com.

entries.source: The film shifts from inspiration into the practical promise: a patient AI learning companion.
entries.value: Filimku wuxuu ka gudbaa dhiirrigelin una gudbaa ballanqaadka wax-ku-oolka ah: wehel barasho AI oo dulqaad leh.

entries.source: The homework and Socratic modes are designed around hints, reasoning, step checks, and learner explanations instead of simply handing over finished answers.
entries.value: Hababka shaqo-guriga iyo Socratic waxaa loogu talagalay tilmaamo yar, sababeyn, hubinta tallaabooyinka, iyo sharaxaadaha bartaha halkii ay si fudud u bixin lahaayeen jawaabo dhammeystiran.

entries.source: The middle section frames inspir around understanding, hints, quizzes, and active learning loops.
entries.value: Qaybta dhexe waxay inspir ku wareejisaa faham, tilmaamo yar, keddisyo, iyo wareegyo barasho firfircoon.
Madal barasho AI oo jiilka xiga ah.

entries.source: The opening frames set up learning as something anyone should be able to start immediately.
entries.value: Muuqaallada furitaanka waxay barashada u dhigaan wax qof kasta isla markiiba bilaabi karo.

entries.source: The public site is structured like a learning map: live modes for immediate help, subject hubs for learner questions, and guides that turn reading into action.
entries.value: Goobta dadweynaha waxaa loo qaabeeyey sidii khariidad barasho: habab toos ah oo caawimo degdeg ah, xarumo maaddo oo su'aalaha bartaha ah, iyo hagayaal akhriska ficil u beddela.

entries.source: The site is a route, not a brochure.
entries.value: Goobtu waa jid, ma aha buug-yare.
Si qoto dheer u fikir
Safar waqti
Kooxo mawduucyo
Qoraal
Ku safar xilli

U rog kaarar xusuus
Qaladaadka u rog wareegyo dib-u-eegis

entries.source: Turn notes or topics into focused flashcards with hints, answers, examples, and common traps.
entries.value: Qoraallo ama mawduucyo u rog kaarar xusuus oo diiradda leh, kuna leh tilmaamo yar, jawaabo, tusaalooyin, iyo dabinno caadi ah.

entries.source: Turn the corrected mistake into a flashcard or short checklist for later.
entries.value: Qaladka la saxay u rog kaar xusuus ama liis-hubin gaaban oo dambe.

entries.source: Turn the explanation into active recall cards with one conceptual card, one example card, and one misconception card.
entries.value: Sharaxaadda u rog kaarar xusuus-celin firfircoon ah oo leh hal kaar fikradeed, hal kaar tusaale ah, iyo hal kaar faham-khaldan ah.

entries.source: Turn the hardest missed question into a flashcard and review it later.
entries.value: Su'aasha ugu adag ee la seegay u rog kaar xusuus, dibna u eeg mar dambe.

entries.source: Turn these missed questions into flashcards grouped by concept, formula, definition, and example.
entries.value: Su'aalahan la seegay u rog kaarar xusuus oo loo kala saaray fikrad, qaaciido, qeexid, iyo tusaale.

entries.source: Turn your syllabus, exam date, time, and weak areas into a practical study plan.
entries.value: Manhajkaaga, taariikhda imtixaanka, waqtiga, iyo meelaha liita u rog qorshe barasho oo wax-ku-ool ah.
Faham mawduuc adag

entries.source: Understand a historical context, question a perspective, compare claims, and separate simulation from documented fact.
entries.value: Faham macne taariikheed, su'aal geli aragti, isbarbar dhig sheegashooyinka, oo matalidda ka sooc xaqiiqo la diiwaangeliyey.

entries.source: Understand code, debug errors, learn programming concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Faham koodh, sax qaladaadka, baro fikradaha barnaamij-samaynta, oo tallaabo tallaabo u dhis mashruucyo yaryar.
Codka filimka fur

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: AI u isticmaal tababare faham, ku celcelin, iyo falcelin, halkii uu ka noqon lahaa jid-gaaban si qarsoodi ah barashada uga saaraya.

entries.source: Use AI homework coaching for hints, step checks, math reasoning, and writing feedback while keeping the final work yours.
entries.value: U isticmaal tababarka shaqo-guriga ee AI tilmaamo yar, hubinta tallaabooyinka, sababeynta xisaabta, iyo falcelinta qoraalka, adigoo shaqada kama dambaysta ah adiga kuu daynaya.

entries.source: Use AI time travel, historical conversations, and debate practice to explore context, evidence, arguments, and perspectives.
entries.value: U isticmaal safarka waqtiga ee AI, wada sheekeysiyo taariikheed, iyo ku celcelinta doodda si aad u sahamiso macne guud, caddeyn, doodo, iyo aragtiyo.
use client

entries.source: Use debate to compare the strongest claim and strongest counterclaim.
entries.value: Dood u isticmaal inaad isbarbar dhigto sheegashada ugu xooggan iyo ka-hor-imaadka ugu xooggan.

entries.source: Use hints, step checks, and writing feedback without turning the learning into answer copying.
entries.value: Isticmaal tilmaamo yar, hubinta tallaabooyinka, iyo falcelinta qoraalka adigoon barashada u rogin koobiyeyn jawaab.

entries.source: Use inspir for essay feedback, reading support, speaking practice, source critique, and revision loops that improve structure without replacing the learner's voice.
entries.value: U isticmaal inspir falcelinta maqaalka, taageerada akhriska, ku celcelinta hadalka, naqdinta ilaha, iyo wareegyada dib-u-habeynta ee hagaajiya qaab-dhismeedka iyagoo aan beddelin codka bartaha.

entries.source: Use inspir for homework hints, math step checks, writing feedback, source critique, Socratic questions, and flashcards without exposing private chats.
entries.value: U isticmaal inspir tilmaamaha shaqo-guriga, hubinta tallaabooyinka xisaabta, falcelinta qoraalka, naqdinta ilaha, su'aalaha Socratic ah, iyo kaarar xusuus adigoon muujin wada sheekeysiyo gaar ah.

entries.source: Use inspir for step-by-step math help, homework hints, Socratic reasoning, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep without answer-copying.
entries.value: U isticmaal inspir caawimo xisaab tallaabo-tallaabo ah, tilmaamo shaqo-guri, sababeyn Socratic ah, keddisyo, kaarar xusuus, iyo diyaarinta imtixaanka adigoon jawaabo koobiyeyn.

entries.source: Use public guest modes for free, then explore the open-source work and school deployment paths.
entries.value: Hababka martida dadweynaha u isticmaal bilaash, dabadeed sahami shaqada il-furan iyo jidadka hirgelinta dugsiga.
Isticmaal su'aalo Socratic ah

entries.source: Use the exam date, syllabus, available time, and weak areas to create a plan that can survive real life.
entries.value: Isticmaal taariikhda imtixaanka, manhajka, waqtiga bannaan, iyo meelaha liita si aad u abuurto qorshe nolosha dhabta ah u adkeysan kara.

entries.source: Use the linked guide, prompt, subject hub, or learning path to review the weak spot later.
entries.value: Isticmaal hagaha, tilmaanta, xarunta maaddada, ama jidka barashada ee ku xiran si aad mar dambe ugu eegto meesha liidata.

entries.source: Use writing feedback for structure, clarity, and evidence while keeping the final draft recognizably yours.
entries.value: Isticmaal falcelinta qoraalka ee qaab-dhismeedka, caddaanta, iyo caddeynta adigoo qabyo-qoraalka kama dambaysta ah ka dhigaya mid weli adiga kuu eg.

entries.source: What an AI learning companion should do for everyone
entries.value: Waxa wehelka barashada AI ay tahay inuu qof walba u sameeyo

entries.source: What learners usually ask before they start.
entries.value: Waxa bartayaashu inta badan weydiiyaan ka hor intaanay bilaabin.

entries.source: What should I ask first when a topic feels too hard?
entries.value: Maxaan marka hore weydiiyaa marka mawduuc aad u adag dareemo?

entries.source: What should I include in a homework prompt?
entries.value: Maxaan ku daraa tilmaanta shaqo-guri?
Waxa aad samayn karto
AI dugsi oo sumad gaar ah leh

entries.source: Why a Socratic AI tutor can make ideas stick
entries.value: Sababta macallin Socratic ah oo AI ahi fikradaha maskaxda ugu dhejin karo
Maxaa taariikhda loogu daraa dood?

entries.source: Why use Socratic questions after an explanation?
entries.value: Maxaa su'aalo Socratic ah loo isticmaalaa sharaxaad ka dib?

entries.source: Work through algebra, calculus, word problems, and math concepts one step at a time with an AI coach.
entries.value: Ka shaqee aljabra, kalkulas, dhibaatooyinka erayada, iyo fikradaha xisaabta hal tallaabo markiiba adigoo la jooga tababare AI ah.
Ka shaqee tallaabooyinka xisaabta

entries.source: Write a three-sentence explanation without looking, then ask the Socratic mode to find the weak link.
entries.value: Qor sharaxaad saddex jumladood ah adigoon eegin, dabadeedna ka codso habka Socratic inuu helo xiriirka liita.

entries.source: Write exactly where you got stuck before asking for help.
entries.value: Qor si sax ah meesha aad ku dhegtay ka hor intaadan caawimo weydiisan.
Qoraal
Tababaraha Qoraalka

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: Haa, marka uu bixiyo tilmaamo yar, hubiyo sababeynta, sharaxo qaladaadka, oo kaa codsado inaad soo saarto jawaabta kama dambaysta ah halkii uu adiga kuu qori lahaa.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: Haa. Wada sheekeysiyada mawduucyada dadweynaha sida Baro Wax Kasta, Barid Socratic ah, Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga, keddisyo, iyo kaarar xusuus waxay si toos ah ugu furmaan habka martida.

entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: Haa. Dugsiyadu marka hore waxay isticmaali karaan adeegga dadweynaha, kadibna waxay ka hadli karaan goobo barasho AI oo la habeeyey, leh habraacyo dugsi-gaar ah, qarsoodi, iyo ikhtiyaarro helitaan oo la maalgeliyey.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: Haa. Hababka barasho ee martida dadweynaha waxaa loogu talagalay helitaan bilaash ah, si bartayaashu u bilaabi karaan iyaga oo aan u baahnayn hirgelin dugsi ama akoonti lacag leh.

entries.source: You can try public learning modes freely. Saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data stay private.
entries.value: Waxaad si xor ah u tijaabin kartaa hababka barashada dadweynaha. Wada sheekeysiyada la kaydiyey, akoontiyada, qalabka maamulka, iyo xogta isticmaaluhu waxay ahaanayaan gaar.
